worker.objective: Test git worktree parallel execution, merge, and conflict handling. Spawn multiple parallel tasks that intentionally create git conflicts on shared files.
instructions: This is a TEST WORKER for validating git worktree functionality.
DO NOT search for requirement files - the test scenario is embedded in this worker.
The test creates parallel subtasks that modify the SAME file to cause merge conflicts.
Each subtask runs in an isolated worktree branch.
After all subtasks complete, the broker will attempt to cherry-pick merge all branches.

plans.requirement: OPERATION: Create | FILE: tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json | CONTENT: set version=1, set name='original', set settings=( set timeout=30, set retries=3 )

OPERATION: Modify | FILE: tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json | CHANGES: set name='alpha-modified', set settings.timeout=60 | ALSO CREATE: tests/fixtures/worktree/alpha_only.txt with content 'Created by alpha worker'

OPERATION: Modify | FILE: tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json | CHANGES: set name='beta-modified', set settings.retries=5 | ALSO CREATE: tests/fixtures/worktree/beta_only.txt with content 'Created by beta worker'

OPERATION: Modify | FILE: tests/fixtures/worktree/shared_config.json | CHANGES: set version=2, add field modified_by='gamma' | ALSO CREATE: tests/fixtures/worktree/gamma_only.txt with content 'Created by gamma worker'
OPERATION: Verify | COMMANDS: Run 'git worktree list' and 'git branch -a' in terminal, then commit a summary to git with message '[test][git] verified worktrees [agent output generated]'
